name: Ease of Use
description: User-friendliness and intuitiveness of the app's interface.
sources: App Store descriptions, User reviews, app tutorials, expert reviews, tech blogs

name: Feature Set
description: Range and quality of photo effects and editing tools offered by the app.
sources: App Store descriptions, Official app descriptions, Official app websites, user reviews

name: Number of Downloads
description: Total number of times the app has been downloaded, indicating its popularity.

name: Platform Availability
description: Availability of the app across different operating systems (iOS, Android, etc.).
sources: App Store descriptions, Official app websites, app stores

name: Price
description: Cost of the app, including any in-app purchases or subscription fees.
sources: App Store, Google Play Store, official app websites

name: Update Frequency
description: How often the app is updated, indicating ongoing support and feature improvements.

name: User Ratings
description: Average user rating on app stores, reflecting overall user satisfaction.
